hub.title: Nadeeb Platform
hub.subtitle: We make it easy — a smart network connecting delegates with Hajj & Umrah companies
hub.delegatesDesc: Join the professional network and serve Guests of Allah with flexibility. Sign up now and get started right away.
hub.companiesDesc: Let Nadeeb handle the field. Dashboard, real-time tracking, and transparent reports.
hub.investorsDesc: A SAR 20B+ market annually — and the field operations segment is still undigitized.

delegates.heroTitle: Become a Nadeeb — Join the Professional Network
delegates.heroSubtitle: Nadeeb connects you directly with certified Hajj & Umrah companies. Work on your terms, earn transparently, and be there when Guests of Allah need you.
delegates.benefit1Desc: Direct access to 200+ Ministry-licensed Hajj & Umrah companies. No middlemen, no waiting around.
delegates.benefit2Desc: Service requests reach you at the right moment. A smart system that knows your location and expertise.
delegates.benefit3Desc: Your balance is protected. Get your earnings every week via direct bank transfer. Rest easy.
delegates.benefit4Desc: The Nadeeb team is with you all season. Any challenge in the field — don't worry, our team has your back.
delegates.formNote: The Nadeeb team will reach out within 48 hours

companies.heroSubtitle: Nadeeb gives you a complete operations dashboard: a ready delegate network, real-time tracking, and transparent performance reports. Focus on serving pilgrims — let Nadeeb handle the field.
companies.heroBadge: B2B Platform for Hajj & Umrah Companies
companies.benefit1Desc: You can track every order and every delegate from a single screen. Daily and weekly reports at the click of a button.
companies.benefit2Desc: Know every delegate's field location in real time. Send the nearest to serve the pilgrim right away.
companies.benefit3Desc: Automatic distribution by specialty and location. No conflicts, no chaos. Everything runs smoothly.
companies.benefit4Desc: Data that helps you evaluate delegates and improve service quality. Everything is clear in front of you.
companies.formNote: A Nadeeb consultant will reach out to schedule a demo

investors.heroTitle: A SAR 20B+ Market — And the Field Segment Is Still Undigitized
investors.heroSubtitle: Nadeeb is a B2B2C platform connecting Hajj & Umrah companies with a professional delegate network. 15% commission per transaction, with revenue tied to guaranteed seasonality.
investors.metric1Label: SAR annual Hajj & Umrah market size
investors.why1: Specialized tech team in the religious tourism sector
investors.why2: Active partnerships with certified Hajj & Umrah companies
investors.why3: Field-tested platform with real delegates and companies
investors.why4: Undigitized field segment — clear market opportunity
investors.why5: Deliberate and phased regional expansion plan
investors.why6: Legal and financial team ready for due diligence
investors.formNote: All information is handled with complete confidentiality. We'll reach out to schedule an investment briefing.

success.title: Done! We've received your request
success.subtitle: Thanks for your interest in Nadeeb. We'll be in touch soon, inshallah.

error.submitFailed: Small hiccup. Try again — if it keeps happening, reach out to us.
error.networkError: Don't worry, it's a connection issue. Check your internet and try again.
